ServiceAccount.UserName: [ServiceAccount Username - Can be a Domain Account]

ADServiceUser.UserName: [ADServiceUser Username - Active Directory Service user for enabling use of Integrated Windows Authentication with your portal.]

Installer.PatchesDir: [Path to Directory with Patches for Server]
PatchInstallOrder: Array of patch names to install in the needed order
Installer.EnableArcMapRuntime: [ Optional - True (Default) | False - Enables ArcMapRuntime. Available starting 10.9.1]
Installer.EnableDotnetSupport: [ Optional - True | False (Default)  - Enables .Net Extension Support. Available starting 10.9.1]

CloudServices.Namespace: [Required if using cloud services for Configuration Store and Service Directory - Unique identifiable string for your deployment to avoid conflicts.]

Portal.PortalLicenseUserTypeId: [Portal License User Type Id- Required for 10.7 and above]

Installer.WebStylesPath: [Optional Parameter starting ArcGIS Enterprise 10.7.1 - Portal Web Styles Installer Path]
Installer.ContentDir: [Portal Content Dir for Install- Ex. C:\arcgisportal
Installer.PatchesDir: [Path to Directory with Patches for Portal]
PatchInstallOrder: Array of patch names to install in the needed order

Portal.DefaultUserLicenseTypeIdForUser: [Optional (Valid for 10.7 and later) - Values: fieldWorkerUT | GISProfessionalStdUT | GISProfessionalBasicUT | GISProfessionalAdvUT | creatorUT | editorUT | viewerUT]

PortalContentCloudStorageAccount.UserName: [Required for AzureBlob and AzureFiles. For Azure use the storage account/blob endpoint name. For AWSS3DynamoDB provide the AWS access key id only when using AccessKey auth; omit for IAMRole.]
PortalContentCloudStorageAccount.Password: [Use Password, PasswordFilePath, or PasswordEnvironmentVariableName. Required for AzureFiles. For AzureBlob required for default/AccessKey and SASToken auth. For AWSS3DynamoDB provide only when using AccessKey auth; omit for IAMRole.]
PortalContentCloudStorageAccount.CloudNamespace: [Required when using cloud storage. For Azure, the module prepends arcgis-portal-content- to the name you provide. For AWS, this value is the target S3 bucket name and must already exist.]
PortalContentCloudStorageAccount.AzureBlobUserAssignedIdentityClientId: [Required if CloudStorageType is 'AzureBlob' and AzureBlobAuthenticationType is 'UserAssignedIdentity']

AzureBlobServicePrincipal.TenantId: [Required if CloudStorageType is 'AzureBlob' and AzureBlobAuthenticationType is 'ServicePrincipal']
AzureBlobServicePrincipal.ClientId: [Required if CloudStorageType is 'AzureBlob' and AzureBlobAuthenticationType is 'ServicePrincipal']
AzureBlobServicePrincipal.ClientSecret: [Required if CloudStorageType is 'AzureBlob' and AzureBlobAuthenticationType is 'ServicePrincipal']

Installer.PatchesDir: [Path to Directory with Patches for DataStore]
PatchInstallOrder: Array of patch names to install in the needed order

Installer.PatchesDir: [Path to Directory with Patches for Web Adaptor]
PatchInstallOrder: Array of patch names to install in the needed order
